byte-order.title: Byte Order
byte-order.summary: Short note explaining big-endian network byte order, little-endian host byte order, and portable conversion helpers like htons, htonl, ntohs, and ntohl.

c.title: C
c.summary: Introductory C notes covering the language model, program structure, variables, printf, operators, control flow, functions, pointers, and foundational syntax.

c-17.title: C++17
c-17.summary: All you need to know about C++17. Follows the book C++17 in detail by Bartłomiej Filipek.

memory-and-address-in-c.title: Memory and Address in C
memory-and-address-in-c.summary: C memory and address notes covering variables, address-of, memory representation, and pointer foundations.

python-intermidiate.title: Python Intermidiate
python-intermidiate.summary: Some intermidiate concepts and features of Python. Follows the book Fluent Python by Luciano Ramalho 2nd Ed.

server-c.title: Server.C
server-c.summary: C server notes focused on process cleanup, SIGCHLD handling, waitpid, sockaddr setup, getaddrinfo, sockets, bind, listen, accept, and fork-based request handling.

tcp-socket.title: TCP Socket
tcp-socket.summary: Networking notes on UNIX sockets, stream versus datagram sockets, TCP reliability, layered network models, ports, IP addresses, and socket address structures.
